zotero.abstractNote: Modern deep learning research is fragmented across multiple frameworks, most notably PyTorch, TensorFlow, and JAX. This fragmentation makes it difficult to write code that is portable across frameworks, which is a major hurdle for research reproducibility and the development of framework-agnostic libraries. We introduce EagerPy, a library that provides a unified interface for PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, and NumPy. EagerPy allows researchers to write code that works natively with all these frameworks, while still allowing them to leverage framework-specific features when needed. EagerPy is designed to be lightweight, easy to use, and to have minimal overhead.
